---
title: "TidyTuesday"
author: "Rachel Roday"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

setwd("C:/Users/RER/Desktop/TidyTuesday")

#Load necessary packages
library(tidytuesdayR)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)

#Go! Get! Your! Data!
tuesdata <- tidytuesdayR::tt_load("2026-02-24")
grants <- tuesdata$sfi_grants


```

```{r}
#Plot that graph
grants %>% 
  mutate(length = end_date - start_date,
         start_year = year(start_date)) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=start_year, y = current_total_commitment, fill = research_body))+
  geom_col(position = "stack")+
  labs(
    x="Start year",
    y = "Committment of Grant (in Irish Dollars)",
    caption= "Source: Science Foundation Ireland | Data Viz: @Rachel_Roday") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```
